title: Spirituality and neurosurgery: A salutogenic current perspective.

assets.abstract: This systematic review aims to determine how spirituality influences prehabilitation and post-operative patient outcomes along with their coping mechanisms while undergoing Neurosurgical intervention. We have endeavoured to explore the feasibility of safe integration of this concept into Neurosurgical care provision. A literature search was carried out and articles were retrieved from PubMed, Science Direct and Cochrane database using specific keywords. We identified a total of 381 studies that

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.
